this is like, literally a stage in GR
this is actually just a regular fangame room and when you exit the right side it tries to put you in the left
i think this guy is Sisyphus himself

sisyphus was a king, he found the god's source of immortality, gave it to his troops, this pissed off the gods so they sentenced all of the troops to infinite death and as punishment sisyphus had to push the boulder, but because he couldn't die he did it quickly and this pissed off the gods even more so they cursed the boulder to always roll down the hill, thus eternity pushing the boulder
the actual myth doesn't really mean much
but more importantly it inspired a french philosophy work called "The Myth of Sisyphus"
which ended with the following quote:

"I leave Sisyphus at the foot of the mountain! One always finds one's burden again. But Sisyphus teaches the higher fidelity that negates the gods and raises rocks. He too concludes that all is well. This universe henceforth without a master seems to him neither sterile nor futile. Each atom of that stone, each mineral flake of that night filled mountain, in itself forms a world. The struggle itself toward the heights is enough to fill a man's heart. One must imagine Sisyphus happy."
you don't need to curse a boulder to go down a hill, gravity does that on its own, stupid ass gods
that's where the meme comes from
that's where "one must imagine sisyphus happy" comes from
yeah ik Albert Camus was kinda stupid ngl
saul goodman would have tricked the boulder
this shit got us waxing philosophical

you have cookie clicker number probability of the cherries all going up, good odds
the cherries burst out in a pattern that reads out as your full credit card number with the expiration date and the numbers on the back
you can tell it's new because this song came out YESTERDAY
got curious and looked it up, the answer is 1000 fruit
